title: Cornerstone Loan Entry — Rate Sheet Not Loading
symptoms: Rate dropdown shows 'No rates available' during loan origination
Rate sheet effective date appears as blank or past date
Error CS-4012: Rate configuration not found for selected product
resolution: Navigate to Cornerstone Admin > Rate Management > Active Rate Sheets. Verify the current rate sheet has status 'Published' and the effective date covers today. If expired, contact the pricing desk to publish a new rate sheet. For CS-4012 errors, confirm the loan product code matches an entry in the active rate sheet — new products require rate sheet line items to be added by a pricing administrator.
escalationPath: Tier 1 Helpdesk > Cornerstone Application Support > Pricing Desk

title: Cornerstone — Collateral Record Linking Failure
symptoms: Cannot attach collateral to loan application — search returns no results
Error CS-5003: Collateral status incompatible with pledge operation
Collateral appears in inventory but grayed out in loan entry
resolution: Collateral must have status 'available' to be newly pledged. If status is 'pledged', it is already attached to another loan — check existing pledges under Collateral Management > Pledge History. If status is 'released', the item must be reactivated by a collateral administrator. For search failures, verify the collateral record's borrower ID matches the loan applicant or is a related entity with documented cross-collateralization agreement.
escalationPath: Tier 1 Helpdesk > Cornerstone Application Support > Collateral Team Lead

title: VPN Connection Drops During Remote Access
symptoms: GlobalProtect VPN disconnects after 10-15 minutes of inactivity
VPN shows 'Connected' but Cornerstone and internal sites are unreachable
Error: 'SSL VPN tunnel renegotiation failed'
resolution: For timeout disconnects: adjust the idle timeout in GlobalProtect client settings to 60 minutes (Settings > Connection > Idle Timeout). For 'connected but unreachable' issues: disconnect VPN, flush DNS (ipconfig /flushdns on Windows, sudo dscacheutil -flushcache on Mac), reconnect using the closest gateway. If SSL tunnel errors persist, uninstall and reinstall the GlobalProtect client — download current version from the SunStream IT portal.

title: MFA Token Not Accepted at Login
symptoms: Six-digit MFA code rejected despite appearing correct
Duo push notification not received on mobile device
Account locked after multiple failed MFA attempts
resolution: Clock drift is the most common cause of MFA code rejection — verify the device clock is set to automatic. For Duo push failures: ensure the mobile device has internet connectivity and Duo Mobile app is updated to the latest version. For locked accounts: Tier 1 can unlock after identity verification (employee ID + manager confirmation). If the MFA device is lost or replaced, a new enrollment must be initiated by the user's IT administrator with identity verification.
escalationPath: Tier 1 Helpdesk > Identity and Access Management

title: Cornerstone — Call Report Generation Errors
symptoms: Call report shows 'Data Validation Failed' with out-of-balance error codes
Schedule D loan totals do not tie to Schedule A balance sheet
Report generation hangs at 'Aggregating loan-level data' step
resolution: Run the Data Integrity Check utility (Cornerstone > Admin > Data Integrity) before generating call reports. Common causes: unposted loan transactions from the current period, pending GL journal entries not yet finalized, or loan status changes made after the report cutoff date without rerunning the period-end process. For hanging reports: check the batch job queue — large portfolios (>2,000 loans) may take 20+ minutes. Do not re-initiate while a job is running.
escalationPath: Tier 1 Helpdesk > Financial Reporting Team > Cornerstone Application Support

title: Email Encryption — Secure Message Not Delivered
symptoms: Borrower reports they did not receive encrypted email with loan documents
Secure email portal shows 'Message pending recipient registration'
Attachment exceeds secure email size limit
resolution: First-time recipients must register on the Zix secure message portal — resend the registration invitation from the Zix admin console. Check the recipient's spam/junk folder for the original notification. For attachment size issues: maximum per-message size is 25MB. For large document packages, use the SunStream Secure File Transfer portal instead (accessible from the IT Services intranet page). Ensure the borrower's email domain is not on the organization block list.

title: Cornerstone — Credit Bureau Pull Failure
symptoms: Credit report request returns error CS-6100: Bureau connection timeout
Credit score field auto-populated with 0 or negative value
Credit report PDF attachment missing from borrower record
resolution: CS-6100 timeout errors typically indicate the credit bureau API integration is experiencing latency or outage — check the SunStream System Status page for known issues. If the system is operational, verify the borrower SSN/EIN is entered correctly (no dashes, 9 digits). For score anomalies: a score of 0 means the bureau returned 'no score available' (thin file) — document this in the credit memo. For missing PDFs: the PDF generation is asynchronous — wait 5 minutes and refresh the borrower record.
escalationPath: Tier 1 Helpdesk > Cornerstone Application Support > Integration Team

title: Printer Not Recognized on Association Network
symptoms: Network printer not appearing in printer list after office move or setup
Print jobs queued but not printing — shows 'Error - Printing' in queue
Scanned documents not arriving in user's Cornerstone document tray
resolution: For missing printers: obtain the printer's IP address from the network label on the device and add it manually via Settings > Printers > Add Printer > TCP/IP. Use the PCL6 driver for standard printing. For queued jobs stuck in error: clear the print spooler (services.msc > Print Spooler > Restart on Windows). For scan-to-Cornerstone issues: verify the scan profile on the MFP has the correct SMTP relay address and the user's Cornerstone document tray folder path is configured in the MFP address book.

title: Cornerstone — Document Generation Template Errors
symptoms: Commitment letter generates with blank merge fields
Wrong state-specific legal language appearing in loan documents
Error CS-7200: Template version conflict
resolution: Blank merge fields indicate the loan record is missing required data — review the loan entry form for empty fields flagged in the merge field mapping (Admin > Document Templates > Field Mapping). For incorrect legal language: verify the state code on the loan's collateral record matches the governing law jurisdiction. CS-7200 occurs when a template was updated while a user had the previous version cached — clear the document cache (Cornerstone > Tools > Clear Cache) and regenerate.
escalationPath: Tier 1 Helpdesk > Cornerstone Application Support > Document Services

title: Annual Compliance Training — Module Access Issues
symptoms: Learning portal returns 'Course not available for your role' error
Completed training not reflected in compliance tracker
Certificate of completion not generating after module finish
resolution: Role-based course access is controlled by the user's role assignment in the HR system — verify with the user's manager that their role code is current. For unrecorded completions: the LMS sync to the compliance tracker runs nightly at 02:00 CT — if the user completed training today, it will appear tomorrow. For certificate issues: ensure all module sections show 100% completion including the post-assessment quiz (minimum 80% passing score required). Certificates can be manually regenerated from LMS Admin > User Records > Certificates.
escalationPath: Tier 1 Helpdesk > Training Administration > HR Systems
